heading: Purpose of Institute
label: 285i Purpose of Institute
text: The general purpose of the National Eye Institute (hereafter in this subpart referred to as the “Institute”) is the conduct and support of research, training, health information dissemination, and other programs with respect to blinding eye diseases, visual disorders, mechanisms of visual function, preservation of sight, and the special health problems and requirements of the blind. Subject to , the Director of the Institute may carry out a program of grants for public and private nonprofit vision research facilities.section 285i–1 of this title
notes: Amendments1993— substituted “Subject to , the Director” for “The Director” in second sentence.Pub. L. 103–43section 285i–1 of this title
amendments: Amendments1993— substituted “Subject to , the Director” for “The Director” in second sentence.Pub. L. 103–43section 285i–1 of this title
